languages.text: {n}Существо издает серию отрывистых лязгов, похожих на смех.{/n} "Поражаюсь ограниченности твоего рассудка. Неужели плененный и ввергнутый в дисфункцию способен к этому? Лишь стоящий подле тебя примитивный, жаждущий знаний, повинен в том, что жизнедеятельность..."{n}Некрон медлит, словно подбирая слова.{/n} "...комплементарного ему разума угасла. Это необратимо".

{n}The creature emits a series of staccato clanking sounds resembling laughter.{/n} "I marvel at the limitations of your reasoning — if one who is captured and driven into dysfunction is even capable of such a thing. Only the knowledge-hungry primitive standing beside you is guilty of..." {n}The Necron pauses, as if choosing its words.{/n} "Extinguishing the vital functions of the intellect that complemented him. It's irreversible."
languages.original_text: {n}Существо издает серию отрывистых лязгов, похожих на смех.{/n} "Поражаюсь ограниченности твоего рассудка. Неужели плененный и ввергнутый в дисфункцию способен к этому? Лишь стоящий подле тебя примитивный, жаждущий знаний, повинен в том, что жизнедеятельность..."{n}Некрон медлит, словно подбирая слова.{/n} "...комплементарного ему разума угасла. Это необратимо".

traits.locale_text: {n}The creature lets out a series of staccato clanking sounds resembling laughter.{/n} "I marvel at the limitations of your reasoning. Is one captured and thrown into dysfunction capable of such a thing? Only the primitive standing beside you, thirsting for knowledge, is guilty of the vital functions of..."{n}The Necron hesitates, as if choosing its words.{/n} "...that intellect that complemented him being extinguished. It's irreversible."

It's irreversible."

languages.text: {n}那生物发出一连串断断续续的铿锵声响，仿佛在大笑。{/n}“你这有限的推理能力，真是让我大开眼界。前提是，一个被俘后机能尽废的人还有推理能力的话。真正有罪的，是你身边那个贪求知识的原始人，是他……”{n}太空死灵停顿了一下，仿佛在斟酌措辞。{/n}“……熄灭了那个与他互补的智能体的生命机能。此事已无可挽回。”
languages.original_text: {n}The creature emits a series of staccato clanking sounds resembling laughter.{/n} "I marvel at the limitations of your reasoning — if one who is captured and driven into dysfunction is even capable of such a thing. Only the knowledge-hungry primitive standing beside you is guilty of..." {n}The Necron pauses, as if choosing its words.{/n} "Extinguishing the vital functions of the intellect that complemented him. It's irreversible."

languages.text: {n}La criatura emite una serie de ruidos inconexos parecidos a una risa.{/n} «Me fascinan los límites de tu razonamiento, suponiendo que una criatura presa de semejante disfunción sea capaz de tal cosa. El primitivo hambriento de conocimiento a tu lado es el culpable de que las funciones vitales de aquel...». {n}El Necrón titubea, como si estuviera eligiendo sus palabras.{/n} «... intelecto que lo complementaba se hayan extinguido. Es irreversible».
languages.original_text: {n}The creature emits a series of staccato clanking sounds resembling laughter.{/n} "I marvel at the limitations of your reasoning — if one who is captured and driven into dysfunction is even capable of such a thing. Only the knowledge-hungry primitive standing beside you is guilty of..." {n}The Necron pauses, as if choosing its words.{/n} "Extinguishing the vital functions of the intellect that complemented him. It's irreversible."

El primitivo hambriento de conocimiento a tu lado es el culpable de que las funciones vitales de aquel...». {n}El Necrón titubea, como si estuviera eligiendo sus palabras.{/n} «... intelecto que lo complementaba se hayan extinguido. Es irreversible».

languages.text: {n}La créature laisse échapper une série de cliquetis saccadés, évoquant un rire.{/n} « Les limitations de votre raisonnement me fascinent. Si l'on admet qu'une entité prise au piège et défaillante puisse être capable d'une chose pareille. Seul l'être primitif qui se tient à vos côtés, assoiffé de connaissances, s'est montré coupable de... » {n}Le Nécron hésite, réfléchissant à ses mots.{/n} « L'extinction des fonctions vitales de l'intellect qui le complétait. Ceci est irréversible. »
languages.original_text: {n}The creature emits a series of staccato clanking sounds resembling laughter.{/n} "I marvel at the limitations of your reasoning — if one who is captured and driven into dysfunction is even capable of such a thing. Only the knowledge-hungry primitive standing beside you is guilty of..." {n}The Necron pauses, as if choosing its words.{/n} "Extinguishing the vital functions of the intellect that complemented him. It's irreversible."

Seul l'être primitif qui se tient à vos côtés, assoiffé de connaissances, s'est montré coupable de... » {n}Le Nécron hésite, réfléchissant à ses mots.{/n} L'extinction des fonctions vitales de l'intellect qui le complétait. Ceci est irréversible. »

languages.text: {n}Yaratık, kahkahaya benzeyen kesik kesik bir dizi şakırtı sesi çıkarıyor.{/n} "Mantık yürütmenizin sınırlarına hayret ediyorum. Esir alınan ve işlevsizliğe sürüklenen biri böyle bir şeye bile yetkinse tabii. Sadece yanında duran, bilgiye aç o ilkel varlık..." {n}Nekron, kelimelerini seçiyormuş gibi duraklıyor.{/n} "Onu tamamlayan aklın yaşamsal işlevlerini söndürüyor. Bunun geri dönüşü yoktur."

languages.text: {n}Die Kreatur stößt ein Stakkato von Klopflauten aus, als würde sie lachen.{/n} "Ich bewundere die Beschränktheit Eures Verstandes ... sofern jemand, der gefangen genommen und seiner Funktionalität beraubt wurde, überhaupt denken kann. Allerdings ist der wissbegierige Primitive neben Euch schuld ..." {n}Der Necron macht eine Pause, als würde er nach Worten suchen.{/n} "An der Auslöschung der Vitalfunktionen des Verstandes, der ihn komplementierte. Das ist unumkehrbar."
languages.original_text: {n}The creature emits a series of staccato clanking sounds resembling laughter.{/n} "I marvel at the limitations of your reasoning — if one who is captured and driven into dysfunction is even capable of such a thing. Only the knowledge-hungry primitive standing beside you is guilty of..." {n}The Necron pauses, as if choosing its words.{/n} "Extinguishing the vital functions of the intellect that complemented him. It's irreversible."

Allerdings ist der wissbegierige Primitive neben Euch schuld ..." {n}Der Necron macht eine Pause, als würde er nach Worten suchen.{/n} "An der Auslöschung der Vitalfunktionen des Verstandes, der ihn komplementierte. Das ist unumkehrbar."

languages.text: {n}ゼノは、笑い声にも似た断続的な金属音を連ねて放った。{/n} 「貴様の推論の限界には感嘆させられる。捕らえられ、機能不全へと投げ込まれた者に、そのようなことが可能だとでも？貴様の隣に立ち、知識に渇望するあの原始的存在だけが、生命活動という罪を犯しているのだ…」 {n}ネクロンは言葉を選ぶかのように、わずかにためらった。{/n} 「…彼を補完していたその知性が、消し去られたという事実を、な」
languages.original_text: {n}The creature lets out a series of staccato clanking sounds resembling laughter.{/n} "I marvel at the limitations of your reasoning. Is one captured and thrown into dysfunction capable of such a thing? Only the primitive standing beside you, thirsting for knowledge, is guilty of the vital functions of..."{n}The Necron hesitates, as if choosing its words.{/n} "...that intellect that complemented him being extinguished."

traits.locale_text:
ネクロンの「笑い」のような金属音。
「あなたの論理の限界に驚かされます。捕らわれ、機能不全に陥った者でさえ、そんなことができるのですか？知識を渇望する原始的な存在だけが、彼を補完する知性の消滅に責任を負います。」
